title: Aerium
description: Aerium, a mix of optimization mods and graphics mods. Aerium is designed for Low/Mid/High End PCs. You want a more optimized modpack, but with great graphics? Start using Aerium Now.
body:
# Aerium

[![Aerium on Github](https://img.shields.io/badge/Aerium%20on%20Github-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/glitchct/Aerium-Development)


Aerium, a well mix of optimization mods & graphically mods.

**Performance**                   
The Performence of Aerium is fast. Aerium uses optimized mods like Sodium, Iris Shader. The fast performance of Aerium helps Low End PC to get higher FPS than **Normal Minecraft.**

**Made & Build with Fabric**                
Fabric Mod Loader is a lightweight, fast, Mod Loader and supports many mods on Modrinth 

### Early Access

You are now able to apply for Early Access via Google Forms.                      
No data will be collected.                                    
[Apply now for Early Access](https://forms.gle/Ypv4oEdqfbttVHKS6)
